Title: Successful user login
Preconditions:
- User account exists in the database with valid credentials (e.g., `user@example.com`, `Password123`).
- User is not already logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the login page.
2. User enters valid email and password.
3. User clicks the "Login" button.
4. System processes credentials and sends request to the database.
5. Database verifies credentials and returns success.
Expected Result:
- User is redirected to the **HOME** page.
- System displays a success message (e.g., "Login successful").
- User session is active (verified via UI/logout button).

Title: Failed user login (invalid credentials)
Preconditions: - User account exists, but credentials are invalid (e.g., wrong password).
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the login page.
2. User enters valid email and invalid password.
3. User clicks the "Login" button.
4. System processes credentials and sends request to the database.
5. Database rejects credentials and returns failure.
Expected Result:
- System displays an error message (e.g., "Invalid email or password").
- User remains on the login page.
- No session is created.

Title: Successful user registration
Preconditions:
- User is not logged in.
- No existing account with the provided email.
Test Data:
- New email: `newuser@example.com`
- Password: `SecurePass123`
- Name: `John Doe`
- Privacy document: Accepted (checkbox checked)
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the registration page.
2. User fills in all required fields (email, password, name) and accepts privacy policy.
3. User clicks the "Register" button.
4. System validates input and sends data to the database.
5. Database inserts user record and returns success.
Expected Result:
- System displays a success message (e.g., "Registration successful. Please log in.").
- User is redirected to the login page.
- New account is created in the database (verified via admin panel or API).

Title: Failed user registration (duplicate email)
Preconditions: - An account already exists with the test email (`user@example.com`).
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the registration page.
2. User enters duplicate email and other valid data.
3. User clicks the "Register" button.
4. System detects duplicate email and returns error.
Expected Result:
- System displays an error message (e.g., "Email already registered").
- User remains on the registration page with form data preserved.
- No new account is created.

Title: Logged-in user bypasses login check
Preconditions: - User is already logged in (session active).
Test Steps: 1. User navigates directly to the **HOME** page (bypassing login check).
Expected Result:
- User is automatically redirected to the **HOME** page without login prompts.
- No error occurs.

Title: View received proposals (data available)
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- User has at least one received proposal in the database.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the **HOME** page.
2. User clicks on "Proposte di scambio" (Exchange Proposals).
3. System checks for received proposals and finds data.
4. System displays the list of received proposals.
Expected Result:
- List of received proposals is rendered with details (e.g., sender, item, date).
- User can click on a proposal to view details.

Title: View sent proposals (data available)
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- User has at least one sent proposal in the database.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the **HOME** page.
2. User clicks on "Proposte di scambio" (Exchange Proposals).
3. System checks for sent proposals and finds data.
4. System displays the list of sent proposals.
Expected Result:
- List of sent proposals is rendered with details (e.g., recipient, item, status).
- User can click on a proposal to view details.

Title: No proposals data available
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- User has no received or sent proposals in the database.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the **HOME** page.
2. User clicks on "Proposte di scambio" (Exchange Proposals).
3. System checks for proposals and finds no data.
Expected Result:
- System displays a message (e.g., "No proposals found").
- User is not redirected and can navigate back to **HOME**.

Title: Accept a received proposal
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- User has at least one received proposal in the database.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the **HOME** page.
2. User clicks on "Proposte di scambio" and views received proposals.
3. User clicks "Accept" on a proposal.
4. System prompts for confirmation.
5. User confirms acceptance.
6. System updates proposal status in the database.
Expected Result:
- Proposal status changes to "Accepted" in the database.
- System displays an updated list of proposals with the accepted proposal marked.
- User receives a success notification (e.g., "Proposal accepted").

Title: Reject a received proposal
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- User has at least one received proposal in the database.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the **HOME** page.
2. User clicks on "Proposte di scambio" and views received proposals.
3. User clicks "Reject" on a proposal.
4. System prompts for confirmation.
5. User confirms rejection.
6. System updates proposal status in the database.
Expected Result:
- Proposal status changes to "Rejected" in the database.
- System displays an updated list of proposals with the rejected proposal removed or marked.
- User receives a success notification (e.g., "Proposal rejected").

Title: Insert a new offer (with image)
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- User has permission to post offers.
Test Data:
- Offer title: "Laptop for Books"
- Description: "Trade my laptop for textbooks."
- Image: Attached (e.g., `laptop.jpg`)
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the **HOME** page.
2. User clicks on "Bacheca personale" (Personal Inbox).
3. User clicks "Inserisci nuova offerta" (Insert New Offer).
4. User fills in title, description, and uploads an image.
5. System requests image capture/selection.
6. User confirms image and submits offer.
7. System saves offer to the database.
Expected Result:
- Offer is added to the database with image.
- System displays a success message (e.g., "Offer posted successfully").
- New offer appears in the user's offer list.

Title: Insert a new offer (without image)
Test Data:
- Offer title: "Books for Bike"
- Description: "Trade textbooks for a used bike."
- Image: Not attached.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the **HOME** page.
2. User clicks on "Bacheca personale" (Personal Inbox).
3. User clicks "Inserisci nuova offerta" (Insert New Offer).
4. User fills in title and description but skips image upload.
5. User submits offer.
6. System saves offer to the database without image.
Expected Result:
- Offer is added to the database without an image.
- System displays a success message (e.g., "Offer posted successfully").
- New offer appears in the user's offer list with a placeholder for the image.

Title: Delete an offer
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- User has at least one offer in the database.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the **HOME** page.
2. User clicks on "Bacheca personale" (Personal Inbox).
3. User views the list of offers.
4. User selects an offer and clicks "Elimina" (Delete).
5. System prompts for confirmation.
6. User confirms deletion.
7. System deletes the offer from the database.
Expected Result:
- Offer is removed from the database.
- System displays a success message (e.g., "Offer deleted successfully").
- Deleted offer no longer appears in the user's offer list.

Title: View offer details
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- User has at least one offer in the database.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the **HOME** page.
2. User clicks on "Bacheca personale" (Personal Inbox).
3. User views the list of offers.
4. User clicks on an offer to view details.
Expected Result:
- Detailed view of the offer is displayed (title, description, image, date).
- User can navigate back to the offer list.

Title: Filter offers (data available)
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- Database contains multiple offers.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the **HOME** page.
2. User clicks on "Esplora offerte" (Explore Offers).
3. System checks for offer data and finds results.
4. User applies a filter (e.g., "Electronics").
5. System retrieves filtered offers from the database.
Expected Result:
- List of offers is displayed, filtered by category.
- Only offers matching "Electronics" are shown.

Title: Filter offers (no data available)
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- Database contains no offers matching the filter.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the **HOME** page.
2. User clicks on "Esplora offerte" (Explore Offers).
3. System checks for offer data and finds results.
4. User applies a filter with no matches.
5. System retrieves no offers from the database.
Expected Result:
- System displays a message (e.g., "No offers found for this filter").
- Empty list is shown.
